name: Petus GDPS
description: Integrates Geometry Dash with the PetusGDPS ecosystem: Petus ID login, Play deep-links, verification screenshots, custom default levels, and Versus competitive multiplayer.

server-base.name: Server base URL
server-base.description: PetusCore API base (Boomlings endpoints + site API).

imgbb-key.name: imgbb API key
imgbb-key.description: Key used to upload verification screenshots.

disable-ingame-login.name: Disable in-game login
disable-ingame-login.description: Hide the account login/register UI; auth comes from the launcher only.

versus-hide-nicks.name: Versus: скрыть ники
versus-hide-nicks.description: Не показывать ники других игроков во время матча Versus.

versus-hide-cubes.name: Versus: скрыть кубы
versus-hide-cubes.description: Не показывать кубики других игроков во время матча Versus.
